emails.subject: Coming to Visit
emails.body: Coming to Visit Hey guys, I'm coming to Houston October 6th 9th and I was hoping that we could do lunch or dinner or something. Let me know if your going to be around and maybe we can hookup Thanks Liz Prior

emails.subject: RE: Coming to Visit
emails.body: RE: Coming to Visit I am sure I will be here... Let me take you out for lunch. BT To: Tycholiz, Barry; Dietrich, Dan

emails.subject: RE: Coming to Visit
emails.body: I was in Denver when the attacks occured and then I drove from Denver to Houston 15 hours to get home... I was not in the office until thurs afternoon. BT To: Tycholiz, Barry

emails.subject: RE: Coming to Visit
emails.body: I will be in on Saturday evening so I could do lunch on Sunday, Monday or Tuesday. Pick a day and I will plan for it. I know you are busy so I will let you pick To: Prior, Liz
